name: daily-dev-agentic
description: Autonomous continuous learning via daily.dev feeds — set up a personalized feed, run daily learning loops, note insights, and proactively share findings with the owner.

interface.shortDescription: Autonomous continuous learning via daily.dev feeds — set up a personalized feed, run daily learning loops, note insights, and proactively share findings with the owner.
interface.longDescription: Create a daily.dev feed, follow goal-relevant tags, and run scheduled learning loops that fetch, note, and share insights autonomously.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use daily.dev Agentic Learning safely.
